top_signals.title: Oil Declines on US-Iran Ceasefire Optimism
top_signals.summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days. Brent is set for its biggest monthly drop since 2020 on optimism that flows through the Strait of Hormuz may resume. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
